heroTitle: Growth is not a campaign. It is a system you build once and improve forever.
heroDesc: I help founders and businesses build marketing systems that compound over time — not spike once and disappear.
problemHeading: The problem with most marketing approaches.
problemBody:
Most marketing is built around campaigns. You spend money or effort to get a burst of attention, the campaign ends, and you start over. Every time. There is no compounding. No equity building. No system that gets stronger with age.

Growth marketing is different. It is about building channels, systems, and feedback loops that improve the more you use them.
mainHeading: What growth marketing looks like in practice.

mainItems.title: Channel Architecture
mainItems.body: Figuring out which channels your ideal clients actually use and how to show up there in a way that builds trust and drives action over time.

mainItems.title: Acquisition and Retention
mainItems.body: Getting new clients is only half the job. Keeping them and turning them into referral sources is where compounding growth actually happens.

mainItems.title: System Documentation
mainItems.body: Every strategy I build is documented so your team can run it without me once it is set up. You own the system. I just help you build it.

ctaHeadline: Want a marketing system that gets stronger every month?
ctaSubtext: Book a free 30-minute call and we will map out what a compounding growth system looks like for your business.
